name: Market Indices
description: Get current quotes for major market indices — S&P 500 (^GSPC), NASDAQ (^IXIC), Dow Jones (^DJI), TA-35 (^TA35.TA), TA-125 (^TA125.TA). Pass "all" to see them all at once.
exampleQuery: How are the major indices doing today?

sampleResponse.summary: US markets are mixed today. S&P 500 up 0.3%, NASDAQ down 0.1%.
insights: The S&P 500 is near all-time highs while tech lags slightly.
